comment: SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex chars) of buildPrompt() rendered against SUMMARY_SENTINEL_ARGS in synthesize-summary-prompt.ts. Run npm test (lib/agents/__tests__/synthesize-summary.test.ts) — it asserts the live hash equals this. v3 (post-M8 follow-up): expanded banned-phrases list with meta-commentary about LLM/parser response counts and removed n_llms_responding / n_parsers_responding from the prompt's input section. v4 (M9.5): added INTERNSHIP CONTEXT preamble prepended when isInternship=true. Cache namespace bumped apeds_summary:v3 → v4 in lockstep, and the cache key now includes is_internship so intern vs non-intern runs don't collide. When you intentionally change the prompt, regenerate via the failing test message and bump the cache namespace (apeds_summary:vN → vN+1) in synthesize-summary.ts so stale completions don't get returned.
